template_data.lead_html: She'd been selling federal for six years. One expired form cost her an active contract.

rows.what_html: Client calls, frantic — contracting officer just removed her from an active award
SAM.gov quietly expired — no automated reminder, no warning flag sent
Re-registered in hours — but the contract disruption took weeks to unwind

template_data.closer: SAM EXPIRES QUIETLY. THE FALLOUT DOESN'T.
template_data.image_prompt: Infographic story layout. Left side: illustrated professional woman in blazer on a phone call, expression alarmed, laptop on desk showing a red warning icon. Right side: vertical timeline with 3 milestone markers — 'CONTRACT ACTIVE' with green checkmark, 'SAM EXPIRES' with red X icon, 'PAYMENT PAUSED' with orange warning icon. Bold headline top: 'SAM EXPIRES QUIETLY.' Dark navy banner at bottom with short callout: 'CHECK TODAY'. Footer text: 'Josh Ladick · GSA Focus'.
